editorVideoSpriteSmokeSectionTitle: Preview sprite sheet from video (§7.5, dev/packaged)
editorVideoSpriteSmokePrereq0: A local video file is open in the editor (fluxmedia:// preview).
editorVideoSpriteSmokePrereq1: Bundled ffmpeg on PATH (Settings → Dependencies → doctor OK).
editorVideoSpriteSmokeStep_open_panel: Editor → FFmpeg rail → “Preview sprite” block: cols×rows grid, PNG/JPEG format.
editorVideoSpriteSmokeStep_burn_timestam: (Optional) Enable “PTS on frames” — drawtext before tile; check readability.
editorVideoSpriteSmokeStep_generate: “Build sprite sheet” → save dialog; wait for done (not cancel).
editorVideoSpriteSmokeStep_verify_file: Open output: frame grid, ≤200 cells; on failure — status/log message.
editorVideoSpriteSmokePass0: Without source Run is disabled; export preview hints unchanged.
editorVideoSpriteSmokePass2: Support ZIP ownerManualSmoke: Video sprite block + sample -vf.
